passives.name: Serendipity
passives.description: While Merlin is in the party, beneficial random events are weighted toward heroes' traits and backgrounds.

skills.name: Arcane Bolt
skills.description: Deal dice + INT damage to a single enemy. Always fires immediately — no charge cost.

skills.name: Fireball
skills.description: Charge: 10. When fully charged, deal 15 damage to all enemies and apply 2 Burn stacks.

skills.name: Barrier
skills.description: Charge: 15. When fully charged, create a party barrier absorbing up to (20 + INT modifier) damage. Expires start of Mage's next turn.

learnable_skills.name: Chain Lightning
learnable_skills.description: Charge: 15. Strike 3 random enemies for 10 damage each. Apply 1 Paralyze to each hit target.

learnable_skills.name: Blizzard
learnable_skills.description: Charge: 30. Deal 12 damage to all enemies immediately, then 12 more damage each of the next 2 turns. Apply Downgrade on cast.

learnable_skills.name: Earthquake
learnable_skills.description: Charge: 15. Deal 18 damage to all enemies. Apply Disadvantage to all enemies for 1 turn.

learnable_skills.name: Meteor
learnable_skills.description: Charge: 25. Deal 30 damage to a single target. Apply 3 Burn stacks to all enemies.
